adapted_package_paths.README.md: Factorio 2.0 release positioning and supported-surface documentation
adapted_package_paths.changelog.txt: MIR 2.5.0 release identity and target-specific history
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/emit/base_extensions.lua: compact count formula required by the Factorio 2.0 parser
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/emit/transactions/product: records the MIR 2.4.0 legacy unit model for exact progress migration
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/planner/native_owner_bind: lowers the paired 3.1.9 cost contract with a 2.4.0 migration snapshot
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/planner/stream_compiler.l: compact count formula required by the Factorio 2.0 parser
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/runtime/productivity_fami: restores 2.4.0 progress using the target migration snapshot
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/streams/direct-effects.lua: omits the two Factorio 2.1-only cargo technology modifiers
